title: Ibergrif MK34052 Chrome Toilet Roll Holder Wall Mounted, Self Adhesive Toilet Paper Holder for Bathroom & Kitchen, Waterproof, No Drilling
features: [POWERFUL SELF ADHESIVE] - Toilet paper holder with sticky 3M adhesive tape backing is strong adhesiveness and waterproof. Modern minimalist L-shaped design, suitable for most usage sceneries.

[NO DRILLING] - Stick on toilet roll holder is easy to install, just peel off film of adhesive pad and stick it on the smooth wall surface, then press for several seconds, no more ugly holes in your walls.
[LOAD 5KGS] - Toilet roll holder wall mounted with a maximum load of 5KGS(11lbs), high stability.
[PREMIUM MATERIAL] - Chrome toilet roll holder is made of 304 stainless steel, scratch-resistant, corrosion-resistant, oxidation-resistant and easy to clean.
[TIPS] - Loo roll holder support vertical or horizonal mounted. Rest it for 24 hours to ensure better adhesive before hanging things on it.
description: From the manufacturer Anti-rust and waterproof material Premium 304 stainless steel construction ensures sturdy in structure and durable to use for maximum reliability. Fit for humid environments. Adhesive toilet holder You can easily mount our toilet paper shelves onto the wall by self-adhesive, never damaging your wall. Support vertical or horizonal mounted. High load capacity The shelf can support a weight of up to 5 kg, its edge can stop the falling of the roll paper effectively. 304 stainless steel material, could be used in humid environment, such as toilet, bathroom or kitchen.
